StowAwayPay.com

Simple savings for non-bank customers.

Posted by ProductPound.com SourceRT UG on 05 Aug, 2023

StowAwayPay.com

a NeoSynFin Product by SourceRT UG

StowAwayPay.com encourages and enable a process of saving for goals and emergencies as opposed to the “Pay Later” model. Goals like vacations or a physical product could be also monetized through partners as a “discount” to the customer and revenue to our business. When the goal is achieved the reward is automatically ordered and delivered
